records.ety: [L. equinus, fr. equus horse; akin to Gr. <?/, Skr. a<?/va, OS. ehu, AS. eh, eoh, Icel. j<?/r, OIr. ech, cf. Skr. a<?/ to reach, overtake, perh. akin to E. acute, edge, eager, a. Cf. Hippopotamus.]

defs: Of, pertaining to, or resembling, a horse.
quotes: The shoulders, body, things, and mane are equine; the head completely bovine.
